title: Dungeons and Taverns Ocean Monument Overhaul
description: This Mod/Datapack Overhauls the Ocean Monument, turning it into a jigsaw structure, every room has randomized walls and floors, and some loot chests are scattered around
body:
This mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does NOT include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

- Makes Ocean Monuments rarer: is now as rare as Woodland Mansions with 1 apearing in an 80x80 chunk grid and 20 chunks being between 2 Ocean Monuments minimum
- Ocean Monument is now a Jigsaw Structure that uses the full space aviable inside them for rooms
- Ocean Monument is split up into 7 Sections which each have 4 variations
- each room has 3-8 variations depending on room type
- there are 4 wall and 4 door types
- every section of the ocean monument has at least 1 treasure room
- the Elder Guardian Chambers have 3 treasure rooms instead
  - 2 lesser treasure rooms and 1 greater treasure room
- the Top Elder Guardian Chamber has a Greater Treasure chest with 1 guranteed Trident (50%-80% durability)
